name: Litmus Doom Swordsman
name_jp: リトマスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Litmus Doom Ritual". It is unaffected by Trap effects and cannot be destroyed by battle. Gains 3000 ATK/DEF while a Trap is on the field. If this Ritual Summoned card in its owner's control is destroyed by your opponent's card: You can target 1 Trap in either GY; Set it to your Spell & Trap Zone.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Litmus Doom Ritual". It is unaffected by Trap effects and cannot be destroyed by battle. Gains 3000 ATK/DEF while a Trap is on the field. If this Ritual Summoned card in its owner's control is destroyed by your opponent's card: You can target 1 Trap in either GY; Set it to your Spell & Trap Zone.
eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Litmus Doom Ritual". It is unaffected by Trap effects and cannot be destroyed by battle. Gains 3000 ATK/DEF while a Trap is on the field. If this Ritual Summoned card in its owner's control is destroyed by your opponent's card: You can target 1 Trap in either GY; Set it to your Spell & Trap Zone.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Sets from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
